user.title: Cooling Zone Manager
user.description: Global settings. You can change all of these later from the Max zones, Overlap time, and Max zone run time entities this integration creates.

data.name: Name
data.max_zones: Maximum zones cooling at the same time
data.max_run_minutes: Max zone run time in minutes, 0 = no limit (a zone running this long is rotated out if other zones are waiting)
data.temp_sensor: Outdoor temperature sensor (optional — lets the outdoor temperature limit how many zones may run at once)

zone.title: Add a cooling zone
zone.description: Zones added so far: {zone_count}. Each zone needs the entity that signals cooling demand (the request) and the entity that actually runs the cooling.

data.name: Zone name (e.g. bedrooms)
data.switch_entity: Cooling switch (what gets turned on and off)
data.add_another: Add another zone after this one

error.duplicate_name: A zone with this name was already added.
error.duplicate_switch: This cooling switch is already used by another zone.
error.same_entity: The request entity and the cooling switch must be different entities.
